1141.reason: [When parsing LVal fails or when LVal is parsed but not followed by '=', the parser should treat the identifier as part of an expression. However, after restoring token position, parseExp() may not correctly parse the same identifier that was previously parsed as LVal, leading to potential parsing errors or infinite loops.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [When parsing LVal fails or when LVal is parsed but not followed by '=', the parser should treat the identifier as part of an expression. However, after restoring token position, parseExp() may not correctly parse the same identifier that was previously parsed as LVal, leading to potential parsing errors or infinite loops.]

1427.reason: [When a semicolon is missing, the parser adds an error but doesn't consume any token, which may cause infinite loops or incorrect parsing continuation since the current token remains unchanged]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [When a semicolon is missing, the parser adds an error but doesn't consume any token, which may cause infinite loops or incorrect parsing continuation since the current token remains unchanged]

1435.reason: [When a right parenthesis is missing, the parser adds an error but doesn't consume any token, leading to potential parsing errors in subsequent analysis]

1443.reason: [When a right square bracket is missing, the parser adds an error but doesn't advance the token stream, which can cause the parser to get stuck or produce cascading errors]
